        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-comment"</span>&gt;</span>#!/usr/bin/env python3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
Deterministic evaluation suite for reasoning benchmarks.

This script is for claim-support evaluation after training, especially when the
question is whether a checkpoint generalizes beyond GSM8K saturation.

Supported benchmarks
--------------------
- gsm8k
- gsm1k
- gsm_symbolic_main
- gsm_symbolic_p1
- gsm_symbolic_p2
- math
- olympiadbench

The script talks to any OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint, including the local
`serve.py` server in this repo.
"""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> __future__ <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> annotations

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> argparse
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> asyncio
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> json
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> os
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> random
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> time
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> dataclasses <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> dataclass
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> pathlib <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Path
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> typing <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Any, Dict, Iterable, List, Optional

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> aiohttp
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> datasets <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> concatenate_datasets, load_dataset
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> latex2sympy2_extended <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> NormalizationConfig
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> math_verify <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> LatexExtractionConfig, parse, verify

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> tinker_atropos.config <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> TinkerAtroposConfig


GSM_QUESTION_SUFFIX = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>" Provide a numerical answer without units, written inside \\boxed{}."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
MATH_QUESTION_SUFFIX = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>" Provide your answer inside \\boxed{}."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

GSM_PREFIX = [
    {
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"user"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"How many r's are in strawberry?"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> + GSM_QUESTION_SUFFIX,
    },
    {
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"assistant"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Let's spell the word out and number all the letters: "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"1) s 2) t 3) r 4) a 5) w 6) b 7) e 8) r 9) r 10) y. "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"We have r's at positions 3, 8, and 9. \\boxed{3}"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        ),
    },
]

MATH_PREFIX = [
    {
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"user"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"What is the sum of all positive integers n such that n^2 divides 12!?"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            + MATH_QUESTION_SUFFIX
        ),
    },
    {
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"role"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"assistant"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"content"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: (
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"We need n^2 | 12!. First, 12! = 2^10 * 3^5 * 5^2 * 7 * 11. "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"For n^2 | 12!, each prime in n can appear at most floor(exponent/2) times. "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"So n divides 2^5 * 3^2 * 5 = 1440. The sum of divisors of 1440 = "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"(1+2+4+8+16+32)(1+3+9)(1+5) = 63 * 13 * 6 = 4914. \\boxed{4914}"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        ),
    },
]

MATH_SUBJECTS = [
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"algebra"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"counting_and_probability"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"geometry"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"intermediate_algebra"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"number_theory"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"prealgebra"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"precalculus"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
]


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-meta"</span>&gt;</span>@dataclass<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-class"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>class<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>Example<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    benchmark: str
    prompt: str
    gold_answers: List[str]
    metadata: Dict[str, Any]


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>parse_args<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>()<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> argparse.Namespace:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Deterministic reasoning benchmark evaluation against an OpenAI-compatible endpoint."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--config"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=str,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Optional Tinker-Atropos YAML config. Used to infer model/base_url/max_tokens/prefix defaults."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--benchmarks"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        nargs=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"+"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        default=[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm8k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
        help=(
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Benchmarks to run. Supported: gsm8k gsm1k gsm_symbolic_main gsm_symbolic_p1 "<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm_symbolic_p2 math olympiadbench all"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        ),
    )
    parser.add_argument(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--base-url"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, type=str, help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8001/v1"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    parser.add_argument(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--model"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, type=str, help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Model name passed to the endpoint"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    parser.add_argument(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--api-key"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, type=str, default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"x"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"API key for the endpoint"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--max-tokens"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=int,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Override generation max_tokens. Falls back to config env.max_token_length or 512."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--temperature"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=float,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Evaluation temperature. Keep at 0.0 for deterministic scoring."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--concurrency"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=int,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>16<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Concurrent requests per batch."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--max-examples"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=int,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Optional cap per benchmark for smoke tests."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--sample-seed"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=int,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>42<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Sampling seed used when max_examples truncates a benchmark."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--output-dir"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        type=str,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"logs/reasoning_eval"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Directory for per-benchmark summaries and prediction jsonl files."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--use-prefix"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        dest=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"use_prefix"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        action=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"store_true"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        default=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Force benchmark-specific worked-example prefix on."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--no-prefix"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        dest=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"use_prefix"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        action=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"store_false"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        help=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Force worked-example prefix off."<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"--include-olympiad-multi-answer"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        action=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"store_true"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> parser.parse_args()


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_clean_gold_answer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(text: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> str:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    text = text.strip()
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> text.startswith(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"$"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>and<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> text.endswith(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"$"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>and<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> len(text) <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>= <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        text = text[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>].strip()
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> text


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_extract_gsm_answer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(answer: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> str:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"####"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> answer:
        answer = answer.split(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"####"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> answer.strip().replace(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>","<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_extract_math_boxed_answer<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(solution: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> str:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    idx = solution.rfind(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"\\boxed{"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> idx == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _clean_gold_answer(solution)

    depth = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    start = idx + len(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"\\boxed{"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(start, len(solution)):
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> solution[i] == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"{"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            depth += <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>elif<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> solution[i] == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"}"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> depth == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
                <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _clean_gold_answer(solution[start:i])
            depth -= <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _clean_gold_answer(solution[start:])


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_gold_parse<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(answer: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_response_parse<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(response_text: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> parse(
        response_text.split(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span>/think<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
        extraction_mode=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"first_match"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        extraction_config=[
            LatexExtractionConfig(
                normalization_config=NormalizationConfig(
                    nits=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                    malformed_operators=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                    basic_latex=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                    boxed=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"all"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                    units=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                ),
                boxed_match_priority=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
                try_extract_without_anchor=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            )
        ],
    )


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_is_correct<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(response_text: str, gold_answers: Iterable[str])<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> bool:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    pred = _response_parse(response_text)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> answer <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> gold_answers:
        gold = _gold_parse(answer)
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> verify(pred, gold):
            <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>False<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_normalize_base_url<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(base_url: str)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> str:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    base_url = base_url.rstrip(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"/"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>not<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> base_url.endswith(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"/v1"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>):
        base_url = base_url + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"/v1"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> base_url


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_sample_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(examples: List[Example], max_examples: Optional[int], seed: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Example]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> max_examples <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>or<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> len(examples) <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span>= max_examples:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> examples
    rng = random.Random(seed)
    sampled = list(examples)
    rng.shuffle(sampled)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> sampled[:max_examples]


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>load_gsm8k_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(max_examples: Optional[int], seed: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Example]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    dataset = load_dataset(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm8k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"main"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, split=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"test"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    examples = [
        Example(
            benchmark=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm8k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            prompt=row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"question"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
            gold_answers=[_extract_gsm_answer(row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"answer"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])],
            metadata={<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"source"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm8k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"id"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: idx},
        )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> idx, row <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(dataset)
    ]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _sample_examples(examples, max_examples, seed)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>load_gsm1k_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(max_examples: Optional[int], seed: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Example]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    dataset = load_dataset(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"ScaleAI/gsm1k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, split=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"test"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    examples = [
        Example(
            benchmark=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"gsm1k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            prompt=row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"question"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
            gold_answers=[_clean_gold_answer(row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"answer"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]).replace(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>","<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)],
            metadata={<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"source"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"ScaleAI/gsm1k"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"id"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: idx},
        )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> idx, row <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(dataset)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _sample_examples(examples, max_examples, seed)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>load_gsm_symbolic_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(variant: str, max_examples: Optional[int], seed: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Example]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    dataset = load_dataset(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"apple/GSM-Symbolic"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, variant, split=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"test"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    examples = [

            metadata={

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>load_math_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(max_examples: Optional[int], seed: int)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Example]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    train_splits = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> subject <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> MATH_SUBJECTS:
        train_splits.append(load_dataset(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"EleutherAI/hendrycks_math"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, subject, split=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"test"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    dataset = concatenate_datasets(train_splits)
    dataset = dataset.shuffle(seed=seed)
    examples = [
        Example(
            benchmark=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"math"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
            prompt=row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"problem"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>],
            gold_answers=[_extract_math_boxed_answer(row[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"solution"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])],
            metadata={<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"source"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"EleutherAI/hendrycks_math"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"subject"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: row.get(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"type"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"id"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: idx},
        )
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> idx, row <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(dataset)
    ]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _sample_examples(examples, max_examples, seed)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>load_olympiadbench_examples<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
